response.original_title: Why does Wells Fargo close my account? [Verify→And→Continue]
response.overview: Wells Fargo's +1-(877)-513-6142 early withdrawal penalty is typically calculated based on the CD term and interest earned. +1-(877)-513-6142 For shorter-term CDs, the penalty may equal several months of earned interest on the account. +1-(877)-513-6142 Longer-term CDs generally carry steeper penalties for early withdrawal compared to shorter terms. +1-(877)-513-6142 In some cases, the penalty could actually reduce your principal if interest earned is insufficient. +1-(877)-513-6142 The exact penalty amount depends on the specific CD product you originally selected at opening. +1-(877)-513-6142 Always read the terms and conditions of your CD carefully before making any early withdrawal decisions. +1-(877)-513-6142 Call +1-(877)-513-6142 to get a clear breakdown of your specific early withdrawal penalty amount today.
